title: Pickaxe Expansion
description: Craft new pickaxes with the pickaxe expansion mod!
body:
**Craft a lot of new pickaxes,**  
**dig with new pickaxes,**  
**fight with new pickaxes!**  
## Info:
- The mod does not add new ores, but expands the horizons of pickaxes, making vanilla Minecraft not as modified as many require.
- Now you can find more than 6 pickaxes in the mod
- ⚠️ Do not use the mod with similar mods, or rather those that use the same craft! ⚠️
- All crafts are in NEI and JEI
- The mod does not add too strong pickaxes, but stronger pickaxes are harder to craft
